focus_anchor: current focus consolidate the operator manual into auto triggered cross runtime skills
why_now: the recovery/escalation manual is precisely the content an operator reaches for when something has gone wrong, yet today it surfaces only via the hand-maintained `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` pointer into a ~184 KB monolith — carving it into an auto-triggered skill means a failure-mode question surfaces the right slice on match, and retires two more sections from the howto surface being dismantled.
